recent_lines: Nobody told me "café stop" meant 45 minutes and a second pastry.
The climb looked shorter on Komoot.
three bikes suitable for today. I'm taking the heavy one again.
somehow the "recovery ride" now has 1,400m of climbing in it
somehow my "quick spin" has a hotel booked on day two
my average speed is completely different before and after a café stop.
my Garmin has seen things it will never forgive me for.
I know every café on this route. Professionally.
Why does my "flat route" always develop hills on the way home?
The group ride "just for fun" and I've already checked everyone's Strava.
I packed four jerseys for a three-hour ride.
nobody told me the "social pace" would be this fast
I have 11 saved routes and I ride the same one every week.
my legs felt fine until someone mentioned the climb ahead.
three hours in and I'm already negotiating with myself about the last climb.
